project_type: Python HF trading system + MQL5 Expert Advisor with shared-file bridge
build_system: pip for Python dependencies; MQL5 compiled by MetaEditor (not available in sandbox)
test_framework: pytest with class-based test organization, tmp_path fixtures, autouse reset fixtures
build_command: N/A (MQL5 cannot be compiled in sandbox; Python has no build step)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest to ensure no new failures. 2. Verify Python intelligence file writes correctly. 3. MQL5 syntax validated by visual inspection (no MetaEditor available).
environment_constraints: No MetaEditor/MQL5 compiler available - MQL5 code validated by syntax consistency only. 5 pre-existing test failures in test_tick_collector.py (file encoding mismatch - UTF-16 vs ASCII) are expected and must not increase.
contribution_requirements: Commit to neurox-v9-release branch. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: Python-to-EA communication via shared files in MT5 Common Files folder (bridge.py writes, EA reads). File format is pipe-delimited or CSV. Bridge class uses self.common_path. Config constants use SIGNAL_FILE_PREFIX='neurox_v9_'. Dashboard uses DashRow/DashSeparator/DashLabel helpers with section-based layout. Colors: CLR_POSITIVE=clrLime (green), CLR_NEGATIVE=clrRed, CLR_NEUTRAL=clrSilver, clrYellow for caution. Dashboard objects prefixed 'NX_'. Global state variables in NeuroX_Types.mqh. OnTimer reads status files and updates dashboard every 500ms.
directory_structure: Root: Python files (main.py, bridge.py, config.py, momentum.py, tick_collector.py). Include/: MQL5 include files (Types, Execution, Dashboard, Pipe, Position, Reconciliation). tests/: pytest test files. NeuroX_EA_v9.mq5: main EA entry point.
